steps.title: Recognize what the task requires
steps.content: To “explain what Psydrax odorata is” means to define the plant by its essential characteristics—its type and origin—not describe incidental findings from a research study.

steps.title: Identify the choice that defines the plant
steps.content: Choice A directly provides the definition: “Psydrax odorata is a flowering shrub species that is native to Oahu, Hawaii,” specifying both its type and origin. Choices B, C, and D all fail to define the plant: B discusses a different species, while C and D provide only research context. That matches choice A — A is correct.
